input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the driver’s feet and legs must be completely contained inside the major structure of the

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.3.1: The driver’s feet and legs must be completely contained inside the Major Structure of the
T.1.3.1 The driver’s feet and legs must be completely contained inside the Major Structure of the 
Chassis.

final_answer: The driver’s feet and legs must be completely contained inside the Major Structure of the Chassis.
